source: Etherscan v2 getsourcecode (verified): WHYPE9 + CoreWriter on HyperEVM (chain 999, hyperevmscan), Bridge2 on Arbitrum (chain 42161, arbiscan). System addresses from HyperLiquid official docs (HyperEVM / Wrapped HYPE / HyperCore<->HyperEVM transfers).
note: I0 contract-inventory for HyperLiquid's ON-CHAIN surface across HyperEVM (999) + Arbitrum (42161). HyperLiquid is split: (a) OFF-CHAIN HyperCore /exchange actions (no contract) — proven by the typed-data + venue corpus, NOT this ABI gate; (b) ON-CHAIN HyperEVM/Arbitrum contracts — this file. cover = user pre-sign surface; exclude = native-transfer sentinel / infra. The EIP-712 user-signed typed-data surface (domain HyperliquidSignTransaction, verifyingContract=0x0) has NO deployed contract — its coverage lives in hyperliquid-sign-transaction.coverage.json (signed_structs, S1/S2) keyed on the cosmetic mainnet signatureChainId 42161. System vanity addresses (0x2222/0x3333/0x5555) are 1차-confirmed against HL docs; WHYPE/CoreWriter/Bridge2 ABIs are Etherscan-verified.

contracts.name: WHYPE9 (Wrapped HYPE, WETH9 fork)
contracts.reason: User ERC20 + wrap/unwrap surface (approve/transfer/transferFrom/deposit/withdraw). Etherscan-verified WHYPE9. 1차: HL docs 'Wrapped HYPE'.

contracts.name: CoreWriter (HyperEVM->HyperCore system contract)
contracts.reason: sendRawAction(bytes) — the EVM->HyperCore write dispatch ScopeBall decodes via tagged_dispatch (15 actions). Etherscan-verified. 1차: HL docs 'Interacting with HyperCore' (CoreWriter.sol).

contracts.name: Bridge2 (HyperLiquid USDC bridge)
contracts.reason: batchedDepositWithPermit = user USDC deposit to HyperCore (the 1 user fn of 14; the rest are validator/finalizer/governance infra). Etherscan-verified Bridge2 on Arbitrum. 1차: HL docs Bridge2.

contracts.name: HYPE system address (HyperCore<->HyperEVM native transfer sink)
contracts.reason: Native HYPE transfer target (selector 0x00000000, no ABI). A bare value transfer to this system address moves HYPE EVM<->Core. No fitting structured ActionBody (Token has no native-transfer variant) — decoded as domain:unknown, which still preserves target+value for a value-threshold policy. Structured representation deferred (would need a new native-transfer ActionBody). 1차: HL docs 'HyperCore<->HyperEVM transfers'.

contracts.name: HyperliquidSignTransaction (EIP-712 user-signed domain, verifyingContract=0x0)
contracts.reason: OFF-CHAIN EIP-712 typed-data domain (no deployed contract; verifyingContract=0x0 sentinel). Coverage is signed_structs-only (12 HyperliquidTransaction:* primaryTypes) in hyperliquid-sign-transaction.coverage.json; the snapshot is an intentionally-empty ABI. Keyed on the cosmetic mainnet signatureChainId 42161 (representative; testnet 421614 deferred).
